+-----------+
|  Input 1  +-+
+-----------+ |    +-------------+
              +--->|  Process 1  +-+
+-----------+ |    +-------------+ |
|  Input 2  +-+                    |
+-----------+                      |    +-----------+                                +---------------+        +------------+
                                   +--->|  Merge 1  +------+                     +-->|  Transform 1  +------->|  Output 1  +-+
+-----------+                      |    +-----------+      | +------------+      |   +---------------+        +------------+ |
|  Input 3  +-+                    |                       +>|  Filter 1  +------+                                           |
+-----------+ |    +-------------+ |                         +------------+      |   +---------------+        +------------+ |
              +--->|  Process 2  +-+                                             +-->|  Transform 2  +------->|  Output 2  +-+
+-----------+ |    +-------------+                                                   +---------------+        +------------+ |
|  Input 4  +-+                                                                                                              |
+-----------+                                                                                                                |
                                                                                                                             |
+-----------+                                                                        +---------------+        +------------+ |    +--------+
|  Input 5  +-+                                                                  +-->|  Transform 3  +------->|  Output 3  +-+--->|  Done  |
+-----------+ |    +-------------+                           +------------+      |   +---------------+        +------------+ |    +--------+
              +--->|  Process 3  +-+                       +>|  Filter 2  +------+                                           |
+-----------+ |    +-------------+ |                       | +------------+      |   +---------------+        +------------+ |
|  Input 6  +-+                    |                       |                     +-->|  Transform 4  +------->|  Output 4  +-+
+-----------+                      |    +-----------+      |                         +---------------+        +------------+
                                   +--->|  Merge 2  +------+
+-----------+                      |    +-----------+
|  Input 7  +-+                    |
+-----------+ |    +-------------+ |
              +--->|  Process 4  +-+
+-----------+ |    +-------------+
|  Input 8  +-+
+-----------+
